mnemonics: R-E-M-O-T-E: Reach, Execute, Message, Over, Talk, End
RPC: Remote Procedure Call, Raise, Conversations
keyPoints: Introduction to Remote Invocation: A mechanism to access distributed services remotely
Request-Reply Protocols: A communication model where a client sends a request and receives a response from the server
Remote Procedure Call: A type of RPC where a program invokes a procedure on a remote machine as if it were local
Introduction to Remote Method Invocation: A technique used to invoke methods on remote objects
